summary: Start M7-APP-SHELL-QUALITY-001 after M7-DESIGN-TOKENS-ASSET-SLOTS-001 closed on origin/main. The task should productize the M7 player app shell using the accepted i18n foundation and design-token/asset-slot foundation while preserving read-model/command authority boundaries and explicit dev overlay separation.

tests_run.result: M7-DESIGN-TOKENS-ASSET-SLOTS-001 CLOSED; M7-APP-SHELL-QUALITY-001 DRAFT and dependency-ready; M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 also DRAFT/READY.
M7-APP-SHELL-QUALITY-001 and M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 are READY candidates.

decisions.decision: Start M7-APP-SHELL-QUALITY-001 before save/cloud boundary planning because the accepted UI/localization/art plan and just-closed token foundation establish the next UI quality track dependency.

No Human Gate is active; task scope explicitly excludes branding, production art, telemetry, server/multiplayer, cloud save implementation, manual node battle, release/commercial decisions, and frozen architecture changes.

risks.summary: The task must hide prototype text, milestone labels, state hashes, revisions, raw reason codes, raw IDs, and test-only names in player mode.
risks.mitigation: Writer must keep explicit dev/debug overlay separation and add Storybook/Playwright coverage for debug-on/off.

risks.summary: The app shell must remain a presentation/read-model coordinator.
risks.mitigation: No WorldState ownership, hidden commands, duplicated simulation formulas, or direct authoritative state mutation in UI/client store.

requested_action: Implement M7-APP-SHELL-QUALITY-001 within allowed paths, run required tests, write validated writer REVIEW handoff, and route to qa_reviewer.
